'''Friijillis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dail sector/Legends|Dail sector]]. The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]-sponsored news network, the [[Friij News Services]]—the clearing house of illegal information and data replication, controlled by the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Criminal Syndicate]]—was based on this planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
